text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 93 

MDCR_MC_UNKNOWN_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare — Unknown Plan Type Manage Care Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year when the beneficiary had some sort of managed 
care coverage, but there is no information available regarding the type of plan (i.e., the plan type code 
is missing). 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment)
